name: Oregon CCB Active Licenses
updateFrequency: unknown; verify current Oregon Open Data portal metadata before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The source name indicates active licenses; inactive, expired, suspended, historical, local, or other agency records may be excluded.
Electrical, plumbing, landscape, asbestos, and other specialized records can be regulated by separate Oregon agencies.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter live download is implemented. Prefer downloaded local files and official portal export mechanisms for future work.
publicRecordsNotes: Official open-data source metadata. Absence from this active-license source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: Oregon Open Data exposes the active-license dataset and export metadata. Offline tests use a tiny hand-authored sample with official column names.
researchNotes: Fixture adapter support exists, but active-only coverage must be represented clearly in verification language.
verificationCaveats: Verification is limited to the checked local fixture-shaped file and currently does not download Oregon source data.
The source is active-license oriented; absence from the fixture or a checked local file is not proof that no Oregon license or historical record exists.
Status normalization uses expiration and source fields preserved in the raw record and should not be treated as a full official standing report.
verificationNotes: Fixture verification uses neutral result states and keeps active-source caveats visible in normalized records.
maintainerNotes: Do not present this source as complete statewide contractor licensing coverage.

researchEvidence.note: Official bulk source and opt-in network path reviewed.
